title: Altar Boy Who Called Out Sexual Abuse in the Philippines Is Now a Lawyer for Victims
summary_full: Michal Gatchalian dared to speak out against sexual abuse by a priest in the devoutly Catholic Philippines. He’s now a lawyer helping other victims.
summary_public: Michal Gatchalian dared to speak out against sexual abuse by a priest in the devoutly Catholic Philippines. He’s now a lawyer helping other victims.
